---
title: "Biobank QC Pipeline: UKBB & PMBB"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(ukbtools)

# Load UKBB data (replace with your paths)
pheno <- ukb_df_read([PHENO_FILE_PATH])  # Field 0,31,34,...
pca <- fread([PCA_FILE_PATH])            # UKBB PCA
king <- fread([KING_KIN_FILE_PATH])      # king_cutoff.txt
cancer_status <- fread([CANCER_FILE_PATH])  # ICD9 and 10 codes

# 1. Remove samples without genotype data
genotype_qc <- fread([UKB_GENOTYPE_QC_PATH])  # has_genotype flag
pheno <- pheno %>% filter(sample.ID %in% genotype_qc$eid[genotype_qc$has_genotype == 1])

# 2. White British ancestry only (PCA-based)
pheno <- pheno %>% 
  left_join(pca, by = "eid") %>%
  filter(genetic_principal_components.f22009_0_0 >= [PCA_PC1_MIN] & 
         genetic_principal_components.f22009_0_0 <= [PCA_PC1_MAX] &
         genetic_sex.f22001_0_0 == 0)  # White British cluster

# 3. Sex mismatch removal
pheno <- pheno %>% filter([SEX_FIELD] == genetic_sex.f22001_0_0)

# 4. Remove 2nd-degree relatives (King kinship > 0.0884)
related <- king %>% filter(kinship > [KING_THRESH_2ND]) %>% pull(fid)
pheno <- pheno %>% filter(!eid %in% related)

# 5. Remove women + prevalent cancer
pheno <- pheno %>% 
  filter([SEX_FIELD] == 1) %>%  # Men only
  anti_join(cancer_status, by = "eid")  # No cancer diagnosis

# 6. Middle-aged men (40-69 years)
pheno <- pheno %>% 
  filter(year_of_birth.f34_0_0 >= [AGE_MIN_YOB] & 
         year_of_birth.f34_0_0 <= [AGE_MAX_YOB])

# Save cleaned cohort
fwrite(pheno, [CLEANED_UKB_FILE], row.names = FALSE)
cat("UKBB QC complete:", nrow(pheno), "samples retained\n")
